sections.sectionTitle: Israel-te Ze-etna Dingin A Kisit Minamte

verses.text: Tu-in Israel-te sung panin Kanaan gamsungah galdona a theikha nailo Israel-te ze-etna dingin Topa in minam pawlkhat a sit hi
Tua khang Israel mite in galdona a theihna ding, nidangin galdona a thei ngeilo tua bang mite a hilh theihna ding bek ahi hi
Tua a sit minamte: Filistia ulian ngate, Kanaan mi khempeuh, Sidon mite, leh Baalhermon Mual panin Hamath lutna ciangdong Lebanon Mual tungah a teng Hiv mite ahi hi
Moses tung tawnin a pu a pate uh a thupiak, Topa' thupiaknate Israel-te in a mang uh hiam, cih a kitheihna dingin amaute pen Israel-te a kize-etna ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, leh Jebus mite' lakah Israel mite teng uh hi
Amaute in a zi dingun a tanute uh la uh a, amau' tanute a tapate uh tungah a pia uh hi. Amaute in a pasian-te uh a bia uh hi.
Topa' muhna-ah Israel-te a sia gamta-in, Topa amau' Pasian mangngilh uh a, Baal-te leh Asherah milimte a bia uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa sinso a, amah in Mesopotamia kumpipa Kushanrishathaim tungah amaute a pia hi. Israel mite in Kushanrishathaim' na kum giat sung a sem uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa' tungah Israel mite kiko uh a, Topa in Kaleb' naupa Kenaz' tapa Othniel, amaute a honkhia dingin a khangsak hi
Topa' Kha ama tungah tung a, amah, Israel mite' thukhen a suak hi. Galsim dingin kuankhia a, Topa in ama khutsungah Mesopotamia kumpipa Kushanrishathaim a pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin a gam in kum sawmli sung tawlngakna hun nei hi. Tua ciangin Kenaz' tapa Othniel a si hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Ehud in Moab-te panin Israel Honkhia

verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa' muhna-ah Israel-te a sia gamta kik uh ahih ciangin Topa in Israel-te' langkhatah Moab kumpipa Eglon thahatsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' muhna-ah amaute a sia gamta uh hi
Eglon in Ammon mite leh Amalek mite ama kiangah khawm a, va kuanin Israel-te va zo hi. Amaute in nisuh khuapi a luah uh hi
Israel mite in Moab kumpi Eglon' na kum sawmlegiat sung a sem uh hi

Ahih hangin Topa' tungah Israel mite a kiko uh ciangin, Topa in Benjamin mi, Gera' tapa a veikhoi Ehud, amaute' honpa dingin a khangsak hi. Israel mite in ama tung tawnin Moab kumpipa Eglon tungah siah a puak uh hi
Ehud in ama-a' dingin langnih a hiam, pi khat leh alang a sau namsau khat bawl a, a puannuai a taklam phei tungah tua namsau a khih hi
Tua ciangin amah in Moab kumpipa Eglon tungah a siah sung hi. Eglon pen a thau mahmah mi khat ahi hi
Ehud in a siahsun' a man khit ciangin siah a puak mite ciahsak hi

Ahih hangin Gilgal kiang suang milimte omna panin amah kileh kikin, “Kumpipa aw, nang tungah gen ding thusim khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Gam dai un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Amah a cing mi khempeuh ama omna panin paikhia uh hi

Innkhum zang inndei a votna sungah amah guak tu-in a om laitakin ama kiangah Ehud hong pai hi. Ehud in, “Pasian' kiang panin nang tungah gen ding thu khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a tutna panin amah dingto hi
Tua ciangin Ehud in a veilam khut tawh a taklam phei panin a namsau la-in, tuapa' gil sungah a siatsuk hi
A namsau banah a bul zong tum a, a thau in a namsau tuamcip hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gil panin amah in a namsau doklo a, a ek lawtkhia hi
Tua ciangin inndei pua-ah Ehud paikhia-in, innkhumzang inndei kongkhakte amah khaknelhin tuate a kalh hi
Amah a paikhiat khit ciangin nasemte hong pai hi. Innkhumzang inndei kongkhakte a kikalh a muh uh ciangin amaute in, “Inn vot sunga inndei-ah awnghawh hi in teh,” ci-in ngaihsun uh hi
A cihna ding uh a theihloh zah dong uh ngak uh hi. Ahih hangin innkhumzang inndei kongkhak amah in a hon' loh veve ciangin, amaute in a tawhtang la-in hong uh a, sual tungah a topa uh na si hi
Amau' zia kikalin Ehud tai-in suang milimte kheng a, Seirah-ah a tai hi
Amah a tun' ciangin Efraim mualtung gamah peengkul a gingsak hi. Mualtung gam panin Israel mite amah tawh paisuk uh a, amau' lutangin Ehud a nei uh hi

Amah in amaute kiangah, “Ka nung hong zui un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na gal uh Moab mite na khutsung uhah hong piazo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama nungah amaute paisuk uh a, Moab mite kiang panin Jordan ngahmunte la-in, mi khat zong galkah saklo uh hi
Tua hunin amaute in a thahat a siam Moab mite khempeuh, mi tul sawm bang that uh a, mi khat zong suaktalo hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Moab gam pen Israel-te' khutnuai a suak hi. Tua gam in kum sawmgiat sung tawlngakna a nei hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Shamgar in Filistia mite panin Honkhia

verses.text: Ama khit ciangin Anath' tapa Shamgar hi a, ciangkhut zum tawh Filistia mite za guk a thatpa ahi hi. Amah in zong Israel-te honkhia hi.
